nasb.text: When it was day, the Jews formed a conspiracy and bound themselves under an oath, saying that they would neither eat nor drink until they had killed Paul.

esv.text: When it was day, the Jews made a plot and bound themselves by an oath neither to eat nor drink till they had killed Paul.

cnv.text: 到了天亮，猶太人在一起祕密計謀，並且發誓說，不殺保羅，就不吃不喝。

ccb.text: 天亮后，犹太人设下阴谋，并起誓说：“不杀保罗，誓不吃喝！”

csbs.text: 天亮了，犹太人就策划了一起阴谋，并且赌咒起誓说，杀掉保罗以前，就不吃不喝。
